itemReviewed.name: D.A.V Centenary Public School - Chander Nagar,Surya Nagar

address.streetAddress: D-Block, Block C, Chander Nagar, Surya Nagar, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh 201011, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I am writing this review to warn parents about the misleading and dishonest practices of D.A.V Centenary Public School Chander Nagar, specifically regarding their so-called "chess program."

Our child was excited to join the chess class, which was promoted as a structured, educational activity. However, the reality is a complete sham.

The "Chess Class" is a Total Farce:

    There is NO chess activity teacher. None. The school charges a premium for an expert-led activity but provides zero instruction.

    For one extra hour every day, the children are simply left in a room without chess boards. There is no teaching, no guidance, and no structured learning.

    This is not a class; It is a pointless waste of our children's valuable time and a missed opportunity for genuine intellectual development.

The Audacious Fee Increase:
To add insult to injury, the school had the nerve to increase the "activity fee" from ₹2600 to ₹3600 while still not hiring a qualified chess teacher. This is an unacceptable price hike for a service that literally does not exist. 

This school is comfortable taking our money for promised services they have no intention of delivering. Charging for a specialist teacher and then not providing one is, at best, deeply negligent and, at worst, intentionally deceptive.

itemReviewed.name: D.A.V Centenary Public School - Chander Nagar,Surya Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: School is charging Rs 2200 as Acitivity Fee over and above the school fee. I paid it last year also and my kid had choosen skates. But sincerely this is of no use as the skates teacher do not put any effort to make kids learn skates at all. Moreover, school is least interested in knowing whether there is any progress in the learning. Might be trainer is underpaid and school is overcharging the parents with no internal governance. Very Poor. I will not pay this Activity Charge this year for sure.

itemReviewed.name: D.A.V Centenary Public School - Chander Nagar,Surya Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I would like to Thank the entire school faculty and management of DAVCPS, Chander Nagar for being so thoughtful and making the life easy for the kids and even for the parents.   My son Amay Tyagi  is quite comfortable and  happy to interact with class teacher and even shares his problem with her.  The work and activities assigned to students is fun filled and entertaining, students enjoyed it alot. Amay knowledge of basic concepts is improving on a daily basis. My  kids are so excited about the special activity which school has organized known as "NO BAG DAY", it's  really a very innovative way of teaching new things and concepts to the students in an entertaining way. They learn new things while playing and interacting with teachers.  THANK YOU so much Deepika  mam for your kind effort and support in developing kids futures.

Anupriya Tyagi
Mother of Amay Tyagi
LKG4

itemReviewed.name: D.A.V Centenary Public School - Chander Nagar,Surya Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: I would like to share my experience with D.A.V. Centenary Public School, Chander Nagar . The School management and the Principal are both incredible in their  jobs.  This school provides a very good learning environment with personal attention is given to each individual child.  Teachers are very friendly, approachable, supportive and hard working. School has an adequate infrastructure and sanitation facilities for students. The extra-curricular activities like “No Bag Day” are making the school environment fun and desirable for the kids. Sports activities are also appreciated with professional guidance. Overall very pleased with the school and highly recommend it.

itemReviewed.name: D.A.V Centenary Public School - Chander Nagar,Surya Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
D.A.V. Chander Nagar school is known to me since a decade when my nephew and niece were studying over here. My son is attending this school as well. He absolutely loves the school and the staff. Teachers are passionate about seeing their students success and the academic program is great. I truly appreciate all you have done to help my son learn and grow and be successful in school as well as in life.
Great school - Great team!

With warm regards

itemReviewed.name: D.A.V Centenary Public School - Chander Nagar,Surya Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: My son is always happy to go to school and full of smiles when we pick him up. attribute this to the exemplary teaching and community feel of the school.
